creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Neglect here suggests "playing solo" from bug 235050 comment 1 was really about self-reflection by the team. Sadly, applying "3 months or 3 timeouts" rule would cause more drama. And creating a new port has poor justification: no breaking changes, downstream-only improvements, cleanup. I really need a new GPU to forget about this port. ;\
